capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an identity management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an identity management service?

questions.prompt: Is the identity management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the identity management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the identity management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the identity management service?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for identity management reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs for identity management reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a centralized management server for managing identities?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a centralized management server for managing identities?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise identity store manage users for the entire scope of the enterprise and subsidiaries, or does it provision users only for enterprise employees (FTE)?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise identity store manage users for the entire scope of the enterprise and subsidiaries, or does it provision users only for enterprise employees (FTE)?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise identity store manage third-party and vendor users as well?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise identity store manage third-party and vendor users as well?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise identity store support automation when creating subject profiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise identity store support automation when creating subject profiles?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise identity store configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise identity store configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Do all enterprise enforcement points in the network integrate with the centralized identity store to get user information?
questions.intent: Evaluate do all enterprise enforcement points in the network integrate with the centralized identity store to get user information?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enforcement point integration with identity store

questions.prompt: Are user information extractions automated with technology like SCIM?
questions.intent: Evaluate are user information extractions automated with technology like SCIM?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have separate roles identified for management of the identity store and the identities themselves?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have separate roles identified for management of the identity store and the identities themselves?
questions.evaluation_focus: Separate roles for identity store and identity management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented process on generating subject profiles by considering multiple attributes like environment, context, and requested scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented process on generating subject profiles by considering multiple attributes like environment, context, and requested scope?

questions.prompt: Is the subject creation process relevant across the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries and third parties, or is it for FTE only?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the subject creation process relevant across the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries and third parties, or is it for FTE only?

questions.prompt: Is the subject profile creation process automated, especially for non-user profiles like IoT devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the subject profile creation process automated, especially for non-user profiles like IoT devices?

questions.prompt: Is the subject profile creation process reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the subject profile creation process reviewed?

questions.prompt: Once created, do enterprise enforcement points incorporate the subject profile into policy creation?
questions.intent: Evaluate once created, do enterprise enforcement points incorporate the subject profile into policy creation?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enforcement points use subject profiles in policy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented process on generating object profiles by considering multiple attributes like environment, context, and requested scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented process on generating object profiles by considering multiple attributes like environment, context, and requested scope?

questions.prompt: Is the object creation process relevant across the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries and third-party servers, or is it for enterprise assets only?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the object creation process relevant across the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries and third-party servers, or is it for enterprise assets only?

questions.prompt: Is the object profile creation process automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the object profile creation process automated?

questions.prompt: Is the object profile creation process reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the object profile creation process reviewed?

questions.prompt: Once created, do enterprise enforcement points incorporate the object profile into policy creation?
questions.intent: Evaluate once created, do enterprise enforcement points incorporate the object profile into policy creation?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enforcement points use object profiles in policy

questions.prompt: After subject and object profile creation, does the enterprise have a formalized documented process of provisioning the identity based on the profile?
questions.intent: Evaluate after subject and object profile creation, does the enterprise have a formalized documented process of provisioning the identity based on the profile?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise automate identity provisioning based on profile?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise automate identity provisioning based on profile?

questions.prompt: Is the provisioning process reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the provisioning process reviewed for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Based on triggers like compromised users, passwords, or expiry of identity, does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for deprovisioning users?
questions.intent: Evaluate based on triggers like compromised users, passwords, or expiry of identity, does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for deprovisioning users?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise automate identity deprovisioning based on triggers?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise automate identity deprovisioning based on triggers?

questions.prompt: Is the deprovisioning process reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the deprovisioning process reviewed for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented formalized process for provisioning third-party users?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a documented formalized process for provisioning third-party users?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise automate third-party identity provisioning based on profile?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise automate third-party identity provisioning based on profile?

questions.prompt: Is the third-party provisioning process reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the third-party provisioning process reviewed for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented formalized process for deprovisioning third-party users?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a documented formalized process for deprovisioning third-party users?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise automate third-party identity deprovisioning based on triggers?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise automate third-party identity deprovisioning based on triggers?

questions.prompt: Is the third-party deprovisioning process reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the third-party deprovisioning process reviewed for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an emergency break glass process in case the identity store is not reachable?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an emergency break glass process in case the identity store is not reachable?

questions.prompt: Is the break glass process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the break glass process reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging identity management and lifecycle changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging identity management and lifecycle changes to the SOC?
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented identity lifecycle logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Is logging of identity changes and lifecycle made securely to the SOC? (This is different from authentication logs or credential creation logs.)
questions.intent: Evaluate is logging of identity changes and lifecycle made securely to the SOC? (This is different from authentication logs or credential creation logs.)
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure identity lifecycle logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the identity profile captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate are dynamic changes to the identity profile captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic identity profile changes to SOC
